---
title: "scANVI Reference Annotation Review"
subtitle: "Reference label transfer with scVI/scANVI"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.warning-list{border-left:4px solid #c2410c;background:#fff7ed;padding:.85rem 1rem;margin:.7rem 0 1rem}
.note-box{border-left:4px solid #2563eb;background:#eff6ff;padding:.85rem 1rem;margin:.7rem 0 1rem}
main.content{max-width:none}.cell-output-display{overflow-x:auto}.cell-output-display img,.cell-output-display svg{max-width:100%;height:auto}
.dataTables_wrapper{max-width:none}.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable{width:auto!important;table-layout:auto!important}
.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable th,.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable td{white-space:nowrap;vertical-align:top}
.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable td.dt-compact-number,.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable th.dt-compact-number{min-width:2.8rem;max-width:6rem;text-align:right}
.dataTables_wrapper table.dataTable td.dt-long-text{white-space:normal;min-width:12rem;max-width:30rem;overflow-wrap:anywhere;line-height:1.25}
</style>
```

```{python}
from html import escape
from pathlib import Path
import json
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

try:
    import plotly.express as px
except ImportError:
    px = None
try:
    import anndata as ad
except ImportError:
    ad = None
try:
    from itables import show
    import itables.options as itable_options
    itable_options.showIndex = False
    itable_options.classes = "display compact stripe hover"
    itable_options.layout = {"topStart": "pageLength", "topEnd": "search", "bottomStart": "info", "bottomEnd": "paging"}
    itable_options.maxBytes = "1MB"
except ImportError:
    show = None

results_dir = Path(".")
payload = json.loads((results_dir / "annotation_result.json").read_text())
cell_predictions = pd.read_csv(results_dir / "tables" / "scanvi_cell_predictions.csv")
label_summary = pd.read_csv(results_dir / "tables" / "scanvi_label_summary.csv")
cluster_summary = pd.read_csv(results_dir / "tables" / "scanvi_cluster_summary.csv")
reference_summary = pd.read_csv(results_dir / "tables" / "scanvi_reference_summary.csv")
training_metrics = pd.read_csv(results_dir / "tables" / "scanvi_training_metrics.csv")
run_status = payload.get("run", {})
run_input = payload.get("input", {})
method = payload.get("method", {})
params = method.get("parameters", {})
warnings = run_status.get("warnings", [])

def display_static_table(df):
    display(HTML(df.reset_index(drop=True).to_html(index=False, escape=False)))

def display_table(df, *, page_length=10, order=None, long_text_columns=None):
    df = df.reset_index(drop=True)
    if show is None:
        display_static_table(df)
        return
    long_text_columns = set(long_text_columns or [])
    compact_columns = {c for c in df.columns if c in {"cluster_id","n_cells","n_predicted_labels","mean_probability","median_probability","top_label_fraction","fraction_cells","max_probability","entropy"}}
    column_defs = []
    compact_targets = [i for i,c in enumerate(df.columns) if c in compact_columns]
    long_targets = [i for i,c in enumerate(df.columns) if c in long_text_columns]
    if compact_targets:
        column_defs.append({"targets": compact_targets, "className": "dt-compact-number", "width": "6rem"})
    if long_targets:
        column_defs.append({"targets": long_targets, "className": "dt-long-text", "width": "28rem"})
    show(df, showIndex=False, scrollX=True, column_filters="header", pageLength=page_length, lengthMenu=[10,25,50,100], order=order or [], autoWidth=True, autoWidthMode="fit", columnDefs=column_defs, deferRender=True, classes="display compact stripe hover")

def artifact_path(name):
    value = payload.get("artifacts", {}).get(name, "")
    if str(value).startswith("results/"):
        return str(value).replace("results/", "", 1)
    return str(value)

def load_annotated_obs():
    if ad is None:
        return pd.DataFrame(), "anndata is not available."
    h5ad = artifact_path("annotated_h5ad") or "adata.annotated.h5ad"
    if not Path(h5ad).exists():
        return pd.DataFrame(), "Annotated h5ad was not found."
    try:
        adata = ad.read_h5ad(h5ad, backed="r")
    except Exception as exc:
        return pd.DataFrame(), f"Could not read annotated h5ad: {exc}"
    try:
        obs = pd.DataFrame(index=adata.obs_names.astype(str))
        prefix = "scrna_annotate_scanvi_reference"
        obs["cell_id"] = obs.index
        obs["label"] = adata.obs.get(f"{prefix}_label", "").astype(str).values
        obs["confidence"] = adata.obs.get(f"{prefix}_confidence", "").astype(str).values
        obs["probability"] = pd.to_numeric(adata.obs.get(f"{prefix}_probability", np.nan), errors="coerce")
        obs["sample"] = adata.obs[run_input.get("sample_key")].astype(str).values if run_input.get("sample_key") in adata.obs else ""
        obs["cluster"] = adata.obs[run_input.get("cluster_key")].astype(str).values if run_input.get("cluster_key") in adata.obs else ""
        if "X_scANVI_umap" in adata.obsm:
            coords = np.asarray(adata.obsm["X_scANVI_umap"])
            obs["UMAP1"] = coords[:, 0]
            obs["UMAP2"] = coords[:, 1]
        elif "X_umap" in adata.obsm:
            coords = np.asarray(adata.obsm["X_umap"])
            obs["UMAP1"] = coords[:, 0]
            obs["UMAP2"] = coords[:, 1]
        return obs.reset_index(drop=True), ""
    finally:
        try:
            adata.file.close()
        except Exception:
            pass
```

## Summary

This report transfers labels from a labeled reference dataset to query cells using scVI/scANVI.
Treat labels as reference-mapping evidence: they are strongest when the reference matches organism,
tissue, technology, and biological condition, and weakest for disease states absent from the reference.

```{python}
display_static_table(pd.DataFrame([
    {"field": "state", "value": run_status.get("state", "unknown")},
    {"field": "schema", "value": payload.get("schema_version", "")},
    {"field": "organism", "value": run_input.get("organism") or "not provided"},
    {"field": "tissue", "value": run_input.get("tissue") or "not provided"},
    {"field": "query counts layer", "value": run_input.get("counts_layer", "")},
    {"field": "reference", "value": params.get("reference_name", "")},
    {"field": "reference label key", "value": params.get("reference_label_key", "")},
    {"field": "annotated cells", "value": len(cell_predictions)},
    {"field": "transferred labels", "value": len(label_summary)},
]))
```

## Warnings

```{python}
if warnings:
    display(HTML("<div class='warning-list'>" + "".join(f"<p><strong>Warning {i}.</strong> {escape(str(w))}</p>" for i, w in enumerate(warnings, start=1)) + "</div>"))
else:
    display(HTML("<div class='note-box'>No warnings were recorded.</div>"))
```

## Reference Summary

```{python}
display_table(reference_summary, page_length=25, long_text_columns=["value"])
```

## Label Summary

```{python}
display_table(label_summary, page_length=25, order=[[1, "desc"]])
```

## Cluster Review

Clusters marked `low confidence` or `mixed cluster` should be reviewed against marker genes and other
annotation methods before final labeling.

```{python}
display_table(cluster_summary, page_length=25, order=[[0, "asc"]], long_text_columns=["label_counts"])
```

## Low Confidence Cells

```{python}
low = cell_predictions[cell_predictions["review_status"].astype(str).str.contains("low", case=False, na=False)]
if len(low):
    display_table(low.head(500), page_length=25)
else:
    display(HTML("<div class='note-box'>No low-confidence cells were reported by the configured probability threshold.</div>"))
```

## scANVI UMAP

```{python}
obs, reason = load_annotated_obs()
if reason:
    display(HTML(f"<div class='note-box'>{escape(reason)}</div>"))
elif px is None:
    display(HTML("<div class='note-box'>plotly is not available, so UMAP plots were not rendered.</div>"))
elif {"UMAP1", "UMAP2"}.issubset(obs.columns):
    fig = px.scatter(
        obs,
        x="UMAP1",
        y="UMAP2",
        color="label",
        hover_data=["cell_id", "cluster", "sample", "probability", "confidence"],
        render_mode="webgl",
        height=700,
        title="Query cells colored by transferred scANVI label",
    )
    fig.update_traces(marker={"size": 3, "opacity": 0.75})
    fig.update_layout(legend_title_text="label")
    fig.show()
else:
    display(HTML("<div class='note-box'>No UMAP coordinates were available in the annotated h5ad.</div>"))
```

## Probability UMAP

```{python}
if not reason and px is not None and {"UMAP1", "UMAP2"}.issubset(obs.columns):
    fig = px.scatter(
        obs,
        x="UMAP1",
        y="UMAP2",
        color="probability",
        hover_data=["cell_id", "cluster", "sample", "label", "confidence"],
        render_mode="webgl",
        height=650,
        color_continuous_scale="Viridis",
        title="Query cells colored by max scANVI probability",
    )
    fig.update_traces(marker={"size": 3, "opacity": 0.75})
    fig.show()
```

## Training Metrics

```{python}
if len(training_metrics):
    display_table(training_metrics, page_length=25)
else:
    display(HTML("<div class='note-box'>No training metrics were available from the scvi-tools model history.</div>"))
```
